class.name: IRCMessage
class.brief_description: Represents a fully parsed raw IRC protocol message.
class.description: Parses and encapsulates an active IRC protocol line into an isolated structure, splitting it into standardized tags, prefixes, commands, and parameters based on the RFC 1459 and IRCv3 specifications.

method.name: decode_base64_string
method.description: Decodes a base64 string retrieved from an IRCv3 payload or tag sequence. Returns the decoded string.

method.name: encode_ctcp
method.description: Wraps a standard payload in CTCP (Client-to-Client Protocol) byte delimiters (\001) for extended IRC interactions such as ACTIONs.

method.name: get_ctcp_command
method.description: Extracts the target CTCP command from the message parameter array if the transmission is a valid CTCP protocol request.

method.name: get_ctcp_params
method.description: Extracts the payload body arguments supplied with a CTCP command.

method.name: get_hostname
method.description: Extracts the hostname portion from the origin client prefix wrapper.

method.name: get_nick
method.description: Extracts the nickname portion from the origin client prefix wrapper.

method.name: get_numeric
method.description: Returns the numeric reply code from the IRC protocol command, or 0 if the command resolves to a character string.

method.name: get_processed_tags
method.description: Returns the IRCv3 metadata tags embedded in the message parsed cleanly into a Godot Dictionary.

method.name: get_tag_value
method.description: Retrieves the explicit variant value of a specific IRCv3 metadata tag natively by its dictionary key.

method.name: get_username
method.description: Extracts the username (ident) portion from the origin client prefix wrapper.

method.name: is_base64
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the provided string evaluates cleanly as a base64 encoded sequence array.

method.name: is_ctcp
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the active payload is encapsulated correctly inside standard CTCP data byte markers.

method.name: is_json
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the provided string is capable of being processed flawlessly as a standard JSON payload format.

method.name: is_numeric
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the underlying command identity is a 3-digit numeric server reply.

method.name: parse
method.description: Accepts a raw IRC sequence line via [param raw_message] and converts it directly into a structurally sound [IRCMessage] object endpoint.

method.name: parse_json_string
method.description: Attempts to parse a formatted JSON string retrieved directly from an IRCv3 data tag pipeline block natively.

members.member: IRC command associated with this message.
Array of parameters supplied with the IRC message.
Prefix identifying the source of the message.
